purpose: Constrain 3.0 feature flows as player relationship graphs derived from the interaction model.

rules.nodesUseInterfaces: Every node must reference an interfaceId or stateId from 4.0 unless it is a clearly named external surface.
rules.edgesAreSourceOfTruth: Every visible connector must come from an edge; renderer must not invent connectors from template order.
rules.evidenceRequired: Every edge requires evidence explaining the PRD/wiki/prototype source or inferred-gap reason.
rules.participationRequired: Every node in a multi-node flow must participate in at least one edge.
rules.multipleFlowsAllowed: Create separate flows for independent player goals instead of forcing unrelated nodes into one diagram.
rules.playerInitiatedOnly: 3.0 flows only show player-active operation paths. Daily refresh, weekly reset, forced settlement, mail fallback, and backend synchronization are not standalone flows unless the source explicitly requires player entry/action.
rules.systemMechanismsGoToNotes: System mechanisms should be represented in 4.0 notes, states, toast/mail/reminder feedback, or red-dot clues.
